title: ononis natrix subvar. quinquefoliolata
intro: Ononis natrix subvar. quinquefoliolata is a species of plant, specifically a type of spiny restharrow, which belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation, due to its antispasmodic and astringent properties. The health benefits associated with Ononis natrix subvar. quinquefoliolata include soothing digestive problems, alleviating menstrual cramps, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
